title: 10 best herbal tinctures for over bleeding during periods
description: Maidenhair tree tinctures helps with over bleeding during periods because of its ability to tone and regulate uterine muscles. The tannins present in the herb help to constrict blood vessels, reducing excessive flow. Additionally, Maidenhair tree has been traditionally used to stop excessive menstruation due to its astringent properties.
